note: old session, unverified: pagination drift likely comes from cursor.js offset math — the base64 token boundaries looked suspicious while poking at a feed complaint. never confirmed, ran out of time
cursor tokens are opaque to clients; mobile and web both store the raw token and pass it back untouched, so any change to encode/decode format is a breaking change and needs a migration window
default feed pageSize is 10; the API rejects pageSize above 100 upstream, so paginate() can assume a sane pageSize
CI runs node --test on node 20; keep the module dependency-free
